description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-avatar` (T1-21). 4/6 libraries ship this.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-avatar/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, image/initials/icon fallback typing, size typing, shape (circle/square) typing
2. Accessibility — image `alt` text required and passed through, initials-only mode needs `aria-label`, decorative avatars have `aria-hidden`, fallback chain (image → initials → icon) maintains accessibility, axe-core pass
3. Tests — image load success/failure fallback, initials generation, icon fallback, all sizes, all shapes
4. Storybook — all modes (image/initials/icon), all sizes, circle/square, fallback demo
5. CSS — circular clipping, `--hx-*` tokens for size/color, CSS parts (image, initials, icon)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB, no unnecessary image loading
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable with server-side initials/alt

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-avatar/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-avatar — T1-21 antagonistic quality review
